headline: David Albright Named Global Head of Sales for Northern Trust Wealth Management
summary: CHICAGO, March 10, 2026--Northern Trust Wealth Management has appointed David Albright as the Global Head of Sales. In this role, Albright will lead client development strategy, sales execution and strategic partnerships. He will report to Wealth Management President Jason Tyler.
